summary: Completed comprehensive testing of vulnerability management system authentication, user management, and permissions. All core features working correctly including JWT-based login, role-based access control, user CRUD operations, and permission-based UI rendering.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Admin login with admin/admin123 credentials successful
Invalid login attempt properly rejected with 401
Get current user info endpoint working with JWT token
Protected routes return 401 when accessed without authentication
Get users list endpoint returns admin user properly
Create new user with limited permissions successful
Update user permissions (grant vulnerabilities create/edit access)
Deactivate user account (set activo: false)
Delete test user successful
Get vulnerabilities list returns 225 records with proper permissions
Create new vulnerability with all required fields
View individual vulnerability by ID
Institution CRUD operations (create, get list)
Dropdown options API returns all required fields
Frontend login page renders correctly with SecFind branding
Login form validation shows error for invalid credentials
Successful admin login redirects to dashboard
Dashboard page loads with user info in navigation
Configuration page accessible with both Instituciones and Usuarios tabs
Users management page loads within configuration
Add User modal opens with permission configuration interface
Navigation between Dashboard, Configuration, and Vulnerabilities
Vulnerabilities page loads with 226 total records
View buttons (eye icons) present in vulnerability table (15 found)
View modal opens showing detailed vulnerability information
Edit buttons visible for admin users (15 found)
Delete buttons visible for admin users (15 found)
Search and filter functionality present on vulnerabilities page
Logout functionality works and redirects to login page
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (16/16 tests), Frontend: 100% (all authentication, navigation, and permission features working)
